title: Spicy Frankfurter Stir Fry
description: A spicy stir fry dish made with sliced frankfurters, served with a creamy sauce.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and stir-fry until they're tender.
Add the sliced frankfurter and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix together the stir-fry sauce, soy sauce, sesame oil, and spicy sauce.
Pour the sauce mixture over the frankfurter and vegetables, and stir-fry for another minute.
Serve the dish hot with a side of creamy sauce.
To make the creamy sauce, mix together 100g of cream and 1 tablespoon of stir-fry sauce.
Heat the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce is hot and creamy.
Serve the creamy sauce over the top of the dish.
Garnish with sliced green onions and serve immediately.
